prompt: Create a serene, photorealistic cinematic landscape of a misty lotus pond at sunrise, inspired by quiet contemplation and the idea that silence reveals profound truths. Use a wide 16:9 canvas with warm golden-orange dawn light, soft volumetric fog hovering over the water, and delicate reflections. In the center of the pond place one tall blue-gray heron standing still in shallow water, facing right, with its full reflection visible beneath it. Frame the left side with one large old weeping cherry tree, dark twisting trunk and long drooping branches covered in pale pink blossoms hanging over the water. The foreground should be filled with broad green lily pads and exactly 9 prominent pink lotus flowers or buds: one partial open blossom at the lower left edge, one open blossom on the left, one closed bud left of center, one open blossom near the lower center, one upright closed bud right of center, one large open blossom at the lower right, one small open blossom mid-right, and two small open blossoms near the far right waterline. In the background, show a forested shoreline of conifers and flowering trees, one small traditional pavilion on the right bank, and the sun low above the treeline slightly right of center, casting radiant beams and a shimmering vertical reflection across the pond. Color palette: peach, rose pink, amber gold, teal green, blue-gray, and soft lavender mist. Style: ultra-detailed fantasy realism, tranquil Japanese garden atmosphere, natural composition, high dynamic range, crisp foreground details with hazy atmospheric depth, no people, no text, no watermark.
